name: Silver Edge
description: Once used to slay an unjust king, only to have the kingdom erupt into civil war in the aftermath.

abilities.name: Shadow Walk
abilities.description: The wielder becomes invisible and gains a movement speed bonus. Grants phase movement while invisible. Cooldown: 20. Mana Cost: 75. Move Speed Bonus: 20%. Duration: 17. Attack Damage Bonus: 300. Movement Speed Cap: 200.
